arts.ttl: Alexander Isak hands Newcastle injury scare before Carabao Cup final as striker ruled out vs Liverpool
arts.sum: Newcastle United forward Alexander Isak has been ruled out of the Premier League clash at Liverpool this evening

arts.ttl: I can't accept Nunez's work-rate - Slot
arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot says he "can't accept" striker Darwin Nunez's work-rate in his past two games.

arts.ttl: Liverpool Hardman Steve McMahon Named His 'Best' Teammate - Snubbed Rush & Dalglish
arts.sum: Liverpool hardman Steve McMahon named his 'best' teammate but snubbed Anfield icons Ian Rush and Kenny Dalglish.

arts.ttl: Newcastle confirm Alexander Isak injury latest as striker misses Liverpool game
arts.sum: Sweden star surprisingly ruled out at Anfield

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool director Ian Graham opens up on Mohamed Salah contract situation
arts.sum: Former Liverpool director of research Ian Graham has spoken about the future of Mohamed Salah at the FT Business of Football Summit. The executive, in words relayed by BBC Sport reporter Nizaar Kinsella, touched on the age of the attacker and how his renewal at Anfield in 2022 was ‘tricky.’ Salah is coming up to […] The post Former Liverpool director Ian Graham opens up on Mohamed Salah contract situation appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Newcastle confirm Alexander Isak injury blow with striker OUT of Liverpool clash
arts.sum: Newcastle have been dealt a huge blow ahead of their pivotal Premier League match away at Liverpool with the news that Alexander Isak misses out due to a groin injury

arts.ttl: Liverpool make two changes for Newcastle as huge Alexander Isak injury blow confirmed
arts.sum: Team news from Anfield as Arne Slot makes two changes to his Liverpool team that hosts Newcastle United in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Alexander Isak is OUT of Newcastle's clash with Liverpool - as forward suffers injury less than three weeks before Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: It is a crunch game in their hunt to finish in the Champions League places, with Eddie Howe 's men sixth in the standings prior to kick off - behind fifth-placed Manchester City on goal difference.

arts.ttl: Premier League live blog: Liverpool-Newcastle, Spurs-Man City
arts.sum: Four Premier League games kick off on Wednesday that have implications for the title race, the top four and beyond. Follow all the action live with ESPN.

arts.ttl: Liverpool v Newcastle United: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 8.15pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Table | Read Football Daily | And mail Will A groin problem has ruled Isak out of tonight’s fixture. A tough blow for Newcastle. It looks very cold and windy at Anfield. If you want a classic, then the weather has to be terrible. I am pretty sure those are the rules. Continue reading...
